tasks.subject: Task 1: Resumable ISK backfill module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** app/intel/killmail_isk_backfill.py — month-chunked, insert-only, resumable backfill with tests. Full code in plan Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/intel/killmail_isk_backfill.py", "tests/test_isk_backfill.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-day aggregation correct", "existing dates untouched", "fully-covered month fast-skips", "20 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backfill wiring + aggregate ISK read + full warm list

tasks.subject: Task 4: History UI section
